title: noronhia tropophylla
intro: Noronhia tropophylla, also known as the Madagascar ironwood, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Noronhia tropophylla include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Noronhia tropophylla include extracts and infusions, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and other medicinal products.
